missions.name: Form Check
missions.goal: Learn the basic Johnny5k rhythm
missions.narrative: Johnny starts you in the soft end of the yard, where every correction matters more than raw force and every clean rep earns trust.

outcomes.victory: The yard settles behind you and {encounter_proof}
outcomes.partial: You keep the lesson alive, but the {encounter_label} still wants cleaner timing before it fully belongs to you.
outcomes.failure: The basics get away from you this time before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Marker Run
missions.goal: Visit the outer flags and return before the bell
missions.narrative: The yard master points to the outer flags and sends you before the dust has even settled. The lesson is simple: return with your pace still under your control.

outcomes.victory: You beat the bell and make the loop look smaller than it felt. {encounter_proof}
outcomes.partial: You make it back with the route still mostly yours, but the {encounter_label} nearly steals the finish.
outcomes.failure: The bell wins the yard and the {encounter_label} closes before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: First Steel
missions.goal: Turn exercise into adventure fantasy
missions.threat: Straw soldiers and light sparring partners
missions.narrative: Wooden weapons, straw armor, and shouted cues make the yard feel like a first battlefield. It is not dangerous yet, but it is real enough to demand conviction.

outcomes.victory: The straw line collapses and the whole exercise finally starts to feel like a mission. The {encounter_label} turns in your favor because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You land enough to make the fantasy stick, but the {encounter_label} still pushes back harder than you want.
outcomes.failure: The first clash overwhelms your timing before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Cadence Yard
missions.goal: Learn pacing, rests, and mission completion
missions.narrative: Now the yard stops forgiving wasted breath. Drill captains watch the clock, the rests, and the way you carry yourself between efforts.

outcomes.victory: You finish the circuit with the pace still under your command. The {encounter_label} never fully settles because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You complete the work, but the {encounter_label} exposes every place where your rest rhythm still leaks control.
outcomes.failure: The captains keep the pressure on and the {encounter_label} turns before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Captain of the Yard
missions.goal: Pass the first real confidence test and earn the road forward
missions.narrative: The captain does not want to break you. They want to know if you'll keep moving once your first confidence runs out.
missions.workout_feel: Short-form full workout with clear instruction and low punishment

outcomes.victory: You earn your place beyond the yard. In {mission_name}, the {encounter_label} breaks your way and you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: The captain sends you back for one more round of preparation, but the {encounter_label} bends just enough for your path to remain open.
outcomes.failure: You recover, regroup, and try again after the {encounter_label} turns before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Shadows in the Streets
missions.goal: Establish tone
missions.narrative: The streets are silent. Too silent. Then... movement. Shapes emerge from the fog.
missions.threat: Shamblers and weak but numerous undead

outcomes.victory: The first wave falls away and Grim Hollow finally sees that someone is willing to answer the dead. The {encounter_label} breaks because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You clear just enough street to breathe, but the {encounter_label} still hangs in the fog around the next corner.
outcomes.failure: The dead take the street back before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: The Burning Chapel
missions.goal: Raise urgency
missions.narrative: Flames consume the chapel. Something inside refuses to burn.

outcomes.victory: The fire stops being their cover and starts looking like your warning to the village. The {encounter_label} stays yours because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You blunt the rush inside the chapel, but the {encounter_label} keeps snapping back whenever the flames surge.
outcomes.failure: The burning pressure swallows your timing before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: The Graveyard Watcher
missions.goal: Build fatigue pressure
missions.narrative: Graves have been disturbed. Something watches from beyond the stones.

outcomes.victory: The watcher loses its patience before you lose yours. In {mission_name}, the {encounter_label} gives way because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You hold through the graveyard drag, but the {encounter_label} remains heavy and unfinished among the stones.
outcomes.failure: Fatigue lets the graveyard settle against you before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: The Hollow Well
missions.goal: Build toward the boss reveal
missions.narrative: The well at the village center descends into darkness. The source is below.

outcomes.victory: You reach the lip of the real descent with your nerve intact. The {encounter_label} opens and the source can no longer hide beneath the village.
outcomes.partial: You force a path to the well, but the {encounter_label} still closes around the descent in ugly bursts.
outcomes.failure: The pressure around the well buckles your progress before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: The Necromancer of Hollow
missions.goal: Confront the source beneath the well
missions.narrative: You descend into the well... and find him waiting. The one who commands the dead. The one who will not yield.
missions.workout_feel: Full workout structure with buildup sets leading into a final confrontation

outcomes.victory: The Necromancer falls. The {encounter_label} finally breaks, and you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: He retreats into shadow. The {encounter_label} bends, but the village is not yet free.
outcomes.failure: You survive, but barely. The {encounter_label} slips away before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Bellows Duty
missions.goal: Learn the forge rhythm

outcomes.victory: The bellows answer cleanly and {encounter_proof}
outcomes.partial: You keep the station alive, but the {encounter_label} still asks for cleaner control.
outcomes.failure: Heat and strain win this round before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Coal Run to the Lower Kiln
missions.goal: Deliver fuel before the flame fades

outcomes.victory: The kiln takes the charge in time. {encounter_proof}
outcomes.partial: The fuel arrives late, but the {encounter_label} stays alive long enough for the forge to keep breathing.
outcomes.failure: The vents steal your tempo and the {encounter_label} closes before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Sparks on the Anvil Line
missions.goal: Hold output under heat
missions.narrative: The anvil line spits sparks across the whole chamber while half-formed things crawl out of the heat to test whether you can keep working under pressure.

outcomes.victory: The line keeps moving and the forge creatures lose their chance to break the rhythm. The {encounter_label} gives because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You hold the anvil line together, but the {encounter_label} still surges every time the chamber flares.
outcomes.failure: The heat wins the tempo and the {encounter_label} turns before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: The Cracked Crucible
missions.goal: Stop a forge core rupture
missions.narrative: Each crack in the crucible throws hotter light across the chamber. The forge wants to split open before you are ready to face what waits behind it.

outcomes.victory: The crucible holds long enough for the deeper confrontation to begin on your terms. The {encounter_label} stays open because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You delay the rupture, but the {encounter_label} remains unstable and angry under every step.
outcomes.failure: The forge breaks its own floor before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: The Forgemaster Unbound
missions.goal: Stabilize the forge and defeat the fused master smith
missions.narrative: Deep in the master forge, the smith who once ruled the city has fused with iron and flame. He strikes the anvil once, and the whole chamber answers.
missions.workout_feel: Full workout with rhythm-based intensity waves

outcomes.victory: The forge stabilizes and the city glows with disciplined fire once more. In {mission_name}, the {encounter_label} stays yours because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: The master withdraws into the furnace heart and the city survives on borrowed time while the {encounter_label} remains contested.
outcomes.failure: The chamber forces you back and the {encounter_label} breaks against you before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Quiet Hands
missions.goal: Establish stealth rhythm
missions.threat: Tripwires, lookouts, pressure to stay clean
missions.narrative: The Wilds do not care how strong you are if you cannot move without announcing yourself. Quiet hands, light steps, and clean breathing matter first here.

outcomes.victory: The lookouts never get a clean read on you and {encounter_proof}
outcomes.partial: You stay mostly hidden, but the {encounter_label} still catches small mistakes in your rhythm.
outcomes.failure: The Wilds hear too much from you before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Message Through the Bramble
missions.goal: Carry an intercepted note to the safehouse

outcomes.victory: The message reaches the safehouse and the route stays yours. {encounter_proof}
outcomes.partial: The note gets through, but the {encounter_label} narrows behind you before the Wilds truly quiet down.
outcomes.failure: The forest cuts your line and the {encounter_label} closes before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: Lanterns in the Leaves
missions.goal: Turn the hunters into the hunted
missions.narrative: False lanterns swing between the trees while arrows wait for the first careless step. The only way through is to seize the ambush before it fully forms.

outcomes.victory: The lights stop dictating the route and the archers lose the upper hand. The {encounter_label} snaps in your favor because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You break part of the trap, but the {encounter_label} still shifts in the canopy whenever you pause.
outcomes.failure: The hidden line closes around you before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: The Thornveil Nest
missions.goal: Cut into the Wilds' command center
missions.narrative: Every step deeper into the nest feels like permission for the Wilds to reveal a sharper layer. The Matron is close enough now that the whole forest moves like an extension of her will.

outcomes.victory: You carve a line into the nest and force the real duel into the open. The {encounter_label} stays broken because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: You reach the inner canopy, but the {encounter_label} remains tangled and hostile around the final approach.
outcomes.failure: The nest folds in on itself before you can {encounter_objective}.

missions.name: The Thornveil Matron
missions.goal: Win the speed-and-precision duel beneath the canopy
missions.narrative: Beneath a canopy of hanging blades and woven roots, the Matron smiles before anyone sees her move.
missions.workout_feel: Full workout built around repeated burst phases

outcomes.victory: The hidden paths belong to you and the Wilds finally whisper your name with respect. The {encounter_label} breaks because you {encounter_objective}.
outcomes.partial: The Matron fades into deeper forest and the {encounter_label} stays unresolved beneath the canopy.
outcomes.failure: The forest closes behind you and the {encounter_label} turns escape into the only victory left.
